assertions.rationale: Code contains options.KeyManagement.Enabled = false in the AddIdentityServer options lambda

assertions.assertion: Program.cs loads a certificate from '/certs/signing.pfx' using X509CertificateLoader.LoadPkcs12 or X509Certificate2
assertions.rationale: Code uses X509CertificateLoader.LoadPkcs12(certBytes, certPassword) after reading from /certs/signing.pfx

assertions.assertion: Program.cs calls AddSigningCredential with the loaded certificate and RS256 algorithm (SecurityAlgorithms.RsaSha256 or 'RS256')
Program.cs does not remove the existing client and scope configuration
assertions.rationale: The existing web-app client, machine-client, api1 scope, and identity resources are all preserved
